title: Aurora Survival
description: Collection of mods that makes playing on the Hungarian Aurora SMP much better.
body:
This modpack aims to improve the vanilla gameplay by adding good-looking shaders, 3d resource packs, and other quality-of-life enchantments like mouse tweaks and maps. This is the recommend pack to play on the Aurora SMP server. 

This modpack will be updated every time the server updates its version so you can comfortably update your client with a few clicks as well!
